title: Automate your trading
author: Playful-Assistant-92
selftext:
Looking to automate your NinjaTrader strategy?

I specialize in building automated trading systems using Strategy Builder and NinjaScript, with experience trading futures markets.

Here’s what I can do for you:

\- Convert your manual strategy into a fully automated system

\- Improve execution speed and consistency

\- Add risk management (SL/TP/trailing) and custom filters

If your rules are already defined, I can turn them into a working strategy quickly. I can also do a small test/prototype first so you can see the quality of my work before committing.

Open to discussing your project. We can work through Fiverr or another secure platform for safety.
